action.say: Start on the wheat line. V then dollar sign to select to the end.
Cursor is at the end. Press O.
Back at the end. Toggle freely.
Capital V on corn, then J J to select three lines.
Cursor is on the oats line. Press O to flip to the corn line.
Now extend the selection upward with K.
That is the trick. Flip ends, then extend in the other direction.
Control V for a block. Select down and right.
Capital O flips to the other corner on the same row.
Lowercase O flips vertically. Capital O flips horizontally in block mode.
